info.name: Didactio Backend
info.description: Single ordered runner flow for the Didactio backend. Set the collection variable `provider` to `openai` or `deepseek` before running the suite. Requests marked `AI GEN` are the ones that invoke model generation directly. Requests marked `Advanced` are drill-down/debug helpers and are not part of the main happy-path runner.

exec: pm.test('Health payload exposes service status', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('ok'); pm.expect(body.service).to.eql('didactio-backend'); });
pm.test('Health payload exposes mongo state', function () { pm.expect(body.mongo).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.mongo.connected).to.be.a('boolean'); });
pm.test('Create Unit Init returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

pm.test('Unit init is created in submitted state', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('submitted'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('moderate_topic'); });
pm.test('Moderate Unit Init returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Unit init moves to moderation completed', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('moderation_completed'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('generate_questionnaire'); pm.expect(body.moderatedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

pm.test('Questionnaire is ready with core questions', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('questionnaire_ready'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('answer_questionnaire'); pm.expect(body.questionnaire.questions).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(body.questionnaire.questions.length).to.be.at.least(5); });
pm.test('Generate Syllabus Prompt returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Generate Syllabus returns 200 or 409', function () { pm.expect([200, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

pm.test('Generated syllabus is structurally valid', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('syllabus_ready'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('review_syllabus'); pm.expect(body.syllabus).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.syllabus.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.syllabus.learningGoals).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; pm.expect(body.syllabus.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
pm.test('Syllabus generation returns a useful AI error', function () { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

pm.test('Updated syllabus is stored before approval', function () { pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('approve_syllabus'); pm.expect(body.syllabus.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.syllabus.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });

pm.test('Syllabus approval advances the lifecycle', function () { pm.expect(body.status).to.eql('syllabus_approved'); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('view_didactic_unit'); pm.expect(body.syllabusApprovedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.didacticUnitId).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('List Didactic Units returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit list returns dashboard summaries', function () { pm.expect(body.didacticUnits).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const linkedUnit = body.didacticUnits.find((unit) => unit.id === pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(linkedUnit).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(linkedUnit.unitInitId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('unitInitId')); pm.expect(linkedUnit.status).to.be.oneOf(['ready_for_content_generation', 'content_generation_in_progress', 'content_generation_completed']); pm.expect(linkedUnit.overview).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(linkedUnit.chapterCount).to.be.a('number').and.to.be.above(0); pm.expect(linkedUnit.generatedChapterCount).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(linkedUnit.progressPercent).to.be.a('number'); });
pm.test('Get Didactic Unit By Id returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Single didactic unit payload is complete', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(body.unitInitId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('unitInitId')); pm.expect(body.status).to.be.oneOf(['ready_for_content_generation', 'content_generation_in_progress', 'content_generation_completed']); pm.expect(body.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });

item.name: 10c AI GEN Generate Didactic Unit Chapter

exec: pm.test('Generate Didactic Unit Chapter returns 200 or 409', function () { pm.expect([200, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

pm.test('Didactic unit chapter generation is structurally valid', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(body.status).to.be.oneOf(['content_generation_in_progress', 'content_generation_completed']); pm.expect(body.generatedChapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const chapter = body.generatedChapters.find((item) => item.chapterIndex === Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(chapter).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(chapter.content).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(chapter.keyTakeaways).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
pm.test('Didactic unit chapter generation returns a useful AI error', function () { pm.expect(body.error).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Get Didactic Unit Chapters returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit chapter list exposes generation flags', function () { pm.expect(body.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const chapter = body.chapters.find((item) => item.chapterIndex === Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(chapter).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(chapter.hasGeneratedContent).to.be.true; });

item.name: 10e Get Didactic Unit Chapter By Index

exec: pm.test('Get Didactic Unit Chapter returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit generated chapter payload is complete', function () { pm.expect(body.chapterIndex).to.eql(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('chapterIndex') || '0')); pm.expect(body.title).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.content).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.keyTakeaways).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
pm.test('Get Didactic Unit Runs returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Didactic unit runs include syllabus and chapter stages', function () { pm.expect(body.runs).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; const stages = body.runs.map((run) => run.stage); pm.expect(stages).to.include('syllabus'); pm.expect(stages).to.include('chapter'); const syllabusRun = body.runs.find((run) => run.stage === 'syllabus'); const latestChapterRun = body.runs.find((run) => run.stage === 'chapter'); pm.expect(syllabusRun.didacticUnitId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(latestChapterRun.didacticUnitId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); });
pm.test('Update Didactic Unit Chapter returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Didactic unit chapter update is stored', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Edited Didactic Foundations'); pm.expect(body.updatedAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Get Unit Init returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Fetched unit-init reflects later lifecycle state', function () { pm.expect(body.id).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('unitInitId')); pm.expect(body.status).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; if (body.status === 'syllabus_approved') { pm.expect(body.didacticUnitId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(body.nextAction).to.eql('view_didactic_unit'); pm.expect(body.handoff).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.handoff.didacticUnitId).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); pm.expect(body.handoff.nextRoute).to.eql('/api/didactic-unit/' + pm.collectionVariables.get('didacticUnitId')); } else { pm.expect(body.planning).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(body.planning.progressPercent).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(body.planning.lastActivityAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(body.planning.isInProgress).to.eql(true); pm.expect(body.planning.syllabusRunCount).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(body.planning.latestSyllabusRunStatus).to.be.oneOf([undefined, 'completed', 'failed']); if (body.planning.latestSyllabusRunAt !== undefined) { pm.expect(body.planning.latestSyllabusRunAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; } } });
pm.test('List Unit Inits returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('List Unit Inits returns only planning summaries', function () { pm.expect(body.unitInits).to.be.an('array'); body.unitInits.forEach((unitInit) => { pm.expect(unitInit.id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(unitInit.topic).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(unitInit.provider).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(unitInit.status).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(unitInit.nextAction).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(unitInit.createdAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(unitInit.lastActivityAt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(unitInit.progressPercent).to.be.a('number'); pm.expect(unitInit.didacticUnitId).to.be.oneOf([undefined, null, '']); }); });

item.name: 98 Advanced Get Syllabus Generation Runs

exec: pm.test('Get Syllabus Generation Runs returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

pm.test('Syllabus run lookup is marked as advanced planning history', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.headers.get('X-Didactio-Endpoint-Tier')).to.eql('advanced'); pm.expect(pm.response.headers.get('X-Didactio-Endpoint-Purpose')).to.eql('planning-history'); });
pm.test('At least one syllabus run is stored', function () { pm.expect(body.runs).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });

pm.test('Latest syllabus run matches expected status', function () { pm.expect(latestRun.status).to.eql(expectedStatus); pm.expect(latestRun.provider).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(latestRun.model).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(latestRun.prompt).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

pm.test('Completed syllabus run includes syllabus payload', function () { pm.expect(latestRun.syllabus).to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(latestRun.syllabus.chapters).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
pm.test('Failed syllabus run includes debug payload', function () { pm.expect(latestRun.error).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(latestRun.rawOutput).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

item.description: Advanced drill-down for syllabus generation traces. Kept out of the main happy-path runner because unit-init detail now exposes the key syllabus run summary directly.

exec: pm.test('Create Unit Init (OpenAI) returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Create Unit Init (DeepSeek) returns 201', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

variable.value: I want to build production-ready applications with Next.js
